content:
Hi everyone! 👋

I'm Zeeshan Khan, a Full-Stack MERN Developer from Pakistan.

Over the past few months, I've been building GetCareerPilot, an AI-powered platform designed to help job seekers create ATS-friendly resumes, generate professional cover letters, blog publish and access career guidance.

The project is built using modern web technologies including React, Node,Express js , JavaScript, Tailwind CSS, REST APIs, and Stripe for payments. Building it has taught me a lot about frontend architecture, backend integration, deployment, authentication, and creating a better user experience.

Like many developers, I started this project to solve a real problem while improving my own skills. There have been plenty of challenges along the way—from integrating payment systems to deploying production applications—but every obstacle has been a valuable learning experience.

I'm excited to be part of this community and would love to learn from all of you.

What has been the biggest challenge you've faced while building and launching your own project?

I'd love to hear your experiences and any advice you have for a fellow developer. 🚀
